prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: HOMO–LUMO energy gap (Koopmans orbital gap) of ethylene; units eV.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”, density-fitted) as implemented in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the fixed Cartesian coordinates supplied in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz (no further relaxation: DFT//input-XYZ).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet treated with restricted Kohn–Sham DFT).
Software/backend: PySCF (version reported by engine; see live log).
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 6 cycles; no engine warnings were issued (`warnings` array empty). All integrity checks passed; integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true.

Result
HOMO = −7.6155818 eV
LUMO = −0.17986527 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV (headline value reported above).

Reproducibility
Command executed (from cli_invocation):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp3qs80dh7/live.json
Live engine log was streamed to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp3qs80dh7/live.out (path shown to user while run was executing; can be inspected with `tail -f`).
Output JSON with full result is saved at ethylene_frontier.json.

Warnings: none reported (result JSON `warnings` array empty).
